news.title: Claude Makes More Money Per User Than Market Leader ChatGPT Report Finds
news.description: The mobile app tracking firm Sensor Tower’s “State of AI” report found that while ChatGPT continues to have the largest user base, Anthropic’s app is earning more money per user.

news.title: Anthropic pauses billing changes as OpenAI prepares for AI price war
news.description: Anthropic has suspended a planned overhaul of its billing structure that was originally scheduled to take effect on June 15, 2026. The proposed changes would have separated usage of the Agent SDK and third-party applications from standard monthly subscription…

news.title: EU Commission keeps contact with Anthropic over decision to disable models in EU

news.title: Nvidia raises over €21.5bn in first bond sale since 2021 as AI growth race continues
news.description: Nvidia has returned to the corporate debt market for the first time in five years, pricing a $25 billion (€21.5bn) bond sale that drew roughly $85 billion (€73.2bn) in orders, a sign of investors' strong appetite for exposure to AI.
